notes: Official DCCEEW ministerial release identifies Australia's two operating refineries as Viva in Geelong and Ampol in Brisbane. This envelope stores facility counts only, not throughput, capacity, utilisation or outage status.
source_rights: Commonwealth copyright and DCCEEW website terms apply
citation: Minister for Climate Change and Energy, Securing Australia's fuel sovereignty, 20 March 2026.

fields.object_definition: Operating Australian refineries named by the official source.

states.note: Official source names Ampol in Brisbane as one of Australia's two operating refineries.
Official source names Viva in Geelong as one of Australia's two operating refineries.

fields.caveat: Do not use this as a throughput, capacity or resilience score.
